name: Profiles Management
description: Adds multi-user profile switching to Jellyfin. A single account can have up to five isolated profiles with separate watch history, parental controls, and library access.

versions.changelog: Feature: Added IsBonfire flag to the profile objects in the get profiles list endpoint, updated the developer API reference with the new field, and successfully integrated the user kick functionality on the frontend and backend.

UX: Moved the Bonfire grouping feature into its own dedicated card in the Manage Profiles view (visible only in manage mode). Fixed incorrect authentication headers for bonfire delete-group and leave endpoints.
Fix: Eliminated a legacy JavaScript syntax error in showEditProfileModal that completely prevented the plugin's script from loading or rendering in the browser.

Fix: Resolved header insertion DOMException crash, added localized caching for synchronous profile resolution on cold boots/reloads, and visually updated both the primary switch button and fallback button to render as identical round themed profile avatars.

UX: Optimized connected devices dropdowns to be focusable and toggleable via D-pad navigation for TV screens. Migrated dropdown inline styling to the central stylesheet and improved phrasing to reflect whitelist behavior.

Feature: Added local network PIN bypass option, connected device logs & restrictions (allowing sub-profiles to be restricted to specific devices, and letting master accounts view/delete connection history), Plex Home-style Bonfire Codes grouping for profile switching across different master accounts with rate limiting, and focusable sidebar navigation for TV clients.

Fix: Resolved race conditions and button state transitions. Wiped out and rebuilt fallback bubbles if the header container or geometric layout anchor is subsequently resolved during navigation ticks, ensuring that the clean, themed header icon is always rendered instead of the fallback pill whenever the DOM completes loading.

Fix: Resolved home screen profile gate loading inconsistency on first-time login by clearing session/local storage on the login and selectserver views. Improved the fallback button's overlap prevention by implementing a dynamic corner-detection algorithm (checking Top-Right, Top-Left, Bottom-Left, and Bottom-Right for overlapping interactive screen elements).

Fix: Added active profile indicator to the home screen switch button (displaying the profile's custom color avatar and initial). Fixed overlapping and positioning issues by moving the floating fallback button to the bottom-left corner and updating mobile responsiveness.

Fix: Resolved Android and password manager login conflicts. Changed PIN entry fields from password type to text type with autofill-disable attributes, and applied CSS text-masking (-webkit-text-security). This prevents Google Autofill and other password managers from attempting to autofill master Jellyfin passwords into the PIN fields while keeping the PIN characters masked.

Fix: Resolved user lockout scenario where an expired master session token would cause all PIN entries to be falsely marked as 'Incorrect PIN'. Added distinct server response codes for invalid PINs (400 Bad Request) vs expired session tokens (401 Unauthorized), enabling the client to automatically detect expired master sessions and redirect the user cleanly to the Jellyfin login screen.

Fix: Fully eliminated the remaining page-load white flash during profile switches. The early-hide script is now injected at the absolute beginning of <head>, running synchronously before any stylesheet links can block the HTML parser. Added color-scheme: dark on the document root to ensure Chrome/Blink defaults its blank canvas color to dark during page tear-down. Older script/style tags from previous versions are cleaned up automatically on update.

Fix: Eliminated remaining white flashes during profile switching. (1) Clicking the Switch Profile button no longer triggers a page reload — the overlay is shown directly in-place, so there is zero reload flash. (2) Profile list is pre-fetched in the background while the button is visible, so the overlay appears instantly on click with no network wait. (3) After selecting a profile, the overlay stays visible and transitions to solid black before the reload fires, so the home screen is never exposed between overlay removal and opacity:0. (4) Removed backdrop-filter:blur from the overlay CSS, which was causing a GPU compositor white flash when the overlay element was first painted. The overlay now uses a solid dark gradient and fades in via double-requestAnimationFrame so the compositing layer is created silently.

Fix: white flash when opening the profile selector or after selecting a profile. _revealPage() is now gated on Jellyfin's viewshow event (fires after React renders the view) so the page is never faded in to a blank shell. When checkRoute() is about to show the gate overlay it skips the reveal entirely and lets showProfileOverlay() call it once the overlay is in the DOM — ensuring the page is always covered before it becomes visible.

Fix: Switch Profile button reappearing as a mispositioned fallback pill on custom themes. Header container detection now uses three strategies: (1) known Jellyfin class names, (2) parent of any known header icon button, (3) button cluster scan inside .skinHeader / Skin Manager theme elements. A new geometry-based pass finds the rightmost button in the top 80px of the viewport as a theme-agnostic second attempt before the true corner-pill fallback. Fixed a CSS conflict where top:15px;right:220px fought with bottom:24px;right:24px, causing the fallback to appear overlapping header controls. Fallback now consistently renders at bottom:24px;right:24px with an icon.

Fix: eliminated remaining flash during profile switch page reload. The current page is now hidden instantly (opacity 0) before window.location.reload() fires at all three switch sites, closing the gap between the old page unloading and the new page's early-hide head script taking effect. Combined with the v1.0.10 head script, the full reload is now seamless — dark on both sides of the navigation with a smooth fade-in when the home screen or gate is ready.

Fix: eliminated the CSS flash/flicker during profile switches. An inline early-hide script injected into <head> now sets html opacity to 0 before React renders on any reload triggered by a profile switch, and profiles.js smoothly fades the page back in once the gate or home screen is ready. The 4-second failsafe restores visibility if profiles.js fails to load.

Auto-inject client script into index.html on every server startup — no manual file editing required. Works across Windows installer, Linux packages (apt/rpm/AUR), and Docker. Idempotent (skips if already present) and self-healing (re-injects after Jellyfin web client updates). Permission failures log a platform-specific fix command (icacls / chown / docker exec). Admin settings page now shows a clear info box explaining that profiles are created from the Jellyfin home screen, not the dashboard.

Fix: 'Add Profile' card no longer appears when the profile limit has been reached — the server's configured limit is now passed to the client so the UI can show a count instead. Fix: validation and API errors in the Create Profile form are now shown inline within the form rather than as native browser alert dialogs.

Security: removed debug logging that wrote full Authorization header values (including live session tokens) to the Jellyfin log on every /list call. Tokens are no longer written to any log file. Also updated plugin description in the catalog.

Fix: Switch Profile button rendering as a full-height bar on some Jellyfin installations. Root cause: Jellyfin's React layout applies CSS transforms to body and inner containers, causing position:fixed to be contained by the transformed element instead of the viewport. Fix: fallback button is now appended to the html element (outside the transform chain) with all styles set inline. Also improved header container detection to use a parent-of-existing-button strategy, making it work across Jellyfin versions that use different class names.

Performance: reduce route-check interval to 150ms; add DOM-based video player detection so the Switch Profile button hides the instant the OSD appears (no URL change needed). UX: button now fades out smoothly instead of jumping. Fix: button no longer appears on any admin/dashboard page — hidden across all server-management routes except the Profiles plugin settings page. Fix: clicking the button now dims it immediately to confirm the tap registered. Fix: eliminated race condition where rapid React re-renders could destroy the button element mid-click.

Fix library access not persisting across server restarts or plugin updates. The plugin now stores enabled libraries in its own configuration (not just Jellyfin's user policy), and re-applies them on every profile switch. Existing profiles auto-migrate on first switch. Edit modal now correctly shows only the libraries the profile actually has access to.

Fix Switch Profile button: now hidden during playback and on the server dashboard. Restore visibility on item detail/browse pages. Add explicit Enter/Space keydown handler for TV D-pad compatibility. Expanded platform docs (Roku, Xbox, PS4/5, Electron, Android native, Tizen/webOS version matrices, tvOS).

Add per-profile inactivity lockout timer (configurable: 1m / 5m / 10m / 20m / 30m / 1h / never). Silent PIN auto-submit on correct keystroke. Security fix: remove auth token from debug log. Cross-platform improvements: pointer events for Magic Remote, auto-focus on profile overlay.
Initial release.
